description: Direct calls-to-action encouraging followers to share opinions, tag friends, or participate in contests with explicit incentives like cash prizes or product trials.
structural_recipe: Open with a question or product presentation. Explicitly ask users to share their answer/rating/choice. Include a clear incentive (cash prize, discount, product giveaway). Add urgency with phrases like 'don't forget' (لا تنسى). Tag relevant hashtags. Use emojis to increase visual appeal and emotional connection. Structure: Question → Call to Action → Incentive → Hashtags
why_it_works: Saudi audiences respond strongly to direct participation requests combined with tangible rewards. The use of colloquial Arabic (شاركنا جوابك) creates intimacy and accessibility. Cash incentives and product trials align with Saudi consumer desire for value and exclusivity. Gamification (contests, choices) drives competitive engagement. Hashtags enable community discovery and trend participation.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure incentives comply with Saudi regulations regarding contests and giveaways
Avoid asking for personal information beyond what is necessary
Frame participation as voluntary to maintain authentic engagement
Test prize mechanics with legal/compliance teams before launching
Cultural context: Direct CTAs work best when phrased as invitations rather than demands
cultural_constraints: Maintain respectful tone aligned with Saudi social values
Avoid controversial topics in engagement prompts
Ensure contest mechanics are transparent and fair
Respect Ramadan sensitivities when running campaigns during Islamic month
